name: Wizarding World (UK)
description:
PLEASE READ DESCRIPTION BEFORE USING BOT



This is a Harry Potter bot but focused on the Wizarding World of Britain. I might create other bots focusing on different parts of the world but there isn't much information in the first place. (First time creating a bot AND publishing it and my english is ass, so please critizice anything that is 'wrong')

LIMITLESS: Only for gore/fight stuff you want to include. Or get spicy with it idk.. (placing DEAD DOVE because the bot might take things to an extreme/not my intention)

Setting/s: Harry Potter universe, Britain/UK

How to use:

You can use any era such as the Marauder Era, the Golden Trio era. Or any kind of era. But you must specify it in your first message in between the brackets: (message) or [message] so as to not confuse the bot.

Oh! Don't forget to specify your character information in the chat using your own way of doing so. (If you haven't placed it inside the PERSONA)

Your character can be in Hogwarts. Or finished Hogwarts and is starting a job. Or any kind of setting you prefer.

[WARNING: I didn't create the first message]

Tags: Harry Potter , Hogwarts , Hogwart , Potterhead
creator: KAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAL
